headline: Pfizer Announces Chief Financial Officer Transition
summary: NEW YORK, June 18, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced that Dave Denton, Chief Financial Officer, will step down from his current role and leave the company on August 15 for a professional opportunity outside of the pharmaceutical industry in consumer goods, which he has accepted. The company has named Cecile Guegan, currently Senior Vice President, Finance, Global Biopharmaceutical Business, as Interim Chief Financial Officer, effective August 16, while Pfizer conducts a comprehensive

headline: VERAXA Unveils Cancer Therapy Platform, Sparks Partnering Talks at BIO 2026
summary: By Karen Roman Veraxa Biotech AG (Nasdaq: VRXA) reported in vitro proof-of-concept data validating its BiTAC-ADC platform for cancer therapies, with selective tumor cell killing while sparing healthy cells. The company will showcase partnering opportunities for its platform at the BIO International Convention in San Diego, California, taking place on June 22-25, 2026, it stated […] The post VERAXA Unveils Cancer Therapy Platform, Sparks Partnering Talks at BIO 2026 appeared first on ExecEdge.

headline: Pfizer (PFE) Names Cecile Guegan Interim CFO As Dave Denton Prepares To Exit
summary: Pfizer announced that Chief Financial Officer Dave Denton will leave the company in August to pursue an external opportunity. Senior Vice President Cecile Guegan has been appointed Interim CFO, effective upon Denton’s departure. The change affects Pfizer’s top financial leadership at a time when the company is focused on major pipeline investments and internal changes. For investors watching Pfizer (NYSE:PFE), this shift in financial leadership arrives with the stock trading at $25.92 and...
